app.title: Crop Recommendation System
app.subtitle: Smart farming decisions powered by AI analysis

form.title: Soil & Environmental Parameters
form.description: Enter your field's measurements to get personalized crop recommendations

results.noSuitable: ⚠ No Suitable Crop Under Current Conditions
results.clickToView: Click a crop to view details above
results.rankedByLeast: Ranked by least unsuitability — corrective measures advised
results.unsuitableWarningAll: Environmental conditions are highly unsuitable for all crops. The following is the least unsuitable option, but corrective measures are strongly advised.
results.unsuitableWarningMost: Environmental conditions are highly unsuitable for most crops. The following are the least unsuitable options, but corrective measures are strongly advised.
results.noRecommendations: No recommendations available. Please try again.
results.aboutSuitable: Based on your soil nutrients and environmental conditions, {{crop}} is the best suited crop with a {{confidence}}% confidence match.
results.aboutUnsuitable: Current conditions are outside the ideal range for most crops. {{crop}} is the least unsuitable option with a {{confidence}}% confidence match. Consider corrective measures before cultivation.
results.globalUnsuitableBanner: No crop in our database is well-suited for these conditions. The recommendations below are the least unsuitable options. Corrective soil or climate measures are strongly advised before planting.
results.limitingFactorDesc: {{feature}} deviates {{deviation}}% from ideal growing conditions — this is the primary bottleneck.
results.fewerThanThree: Only {{count}} crop(s) met minimum viability thresholds.

stress.description: Measures deviation from ideal growing conditions. Higher stress reduces confidence and may trigger tier downgrades.

disclaimer: This AI advisory is based on provided environmental parameters. Consult local agricultural experts before final decision.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Crop Recommendation System • Empowering farmers with data-driven decisions

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Our intelligent system analyzes your soil nutrients (N, P, K), environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, rainfall), and soil pH to recommend the most suitable crop for your field.
howItWorks.getStarted: Get started: Fill in the form above with your field measurements and click the submit button to receive personalized crop recommendations along with cultivation tips and expected yield information.

errors.title: Error
errors.serverHint: Make sure the backend server is reachable. If you're running locally, ensure Django is started.

warnings.fallbackThresholds: All crops violate critical environmental thresholds. Soil and climate correction required.
warnings.oodValues: Some values ({{fields}}) fall outside typical ranges. Confidence adjusted.
warnings.highStress: High agricultural stress detected (index={{index}}). Recommendations may have reduced confidence.
warnings.challengingConditions: Conditions may be challenging for most crops. Consider consulting local experts.

explanation.tempInRange: Temperature ({{temp}}°C) is within the suitable range [{{min}}–{{max}}°C] for {{crop}}.
explanation.tempBelow: Temperature ({{temp}}°C) is {{deficit}}°C below {{crop}}'s minimum ({{min}}°C). Cold stress risk.
explanation.tempAbove: Temperature ({{temp}}°C) is {{excess}}°C above {{crop}}'s maximum ({{max}}°C). Heat stress risk.
explanation.rainBelow: Rainfall ({{rain}}mm) is below {{crop}}'s minimum ({{min}}mm). Supplementary irrigation strongly advised.
explanation.rainAbove: Rainfall ({{rain}}mm) exceeds {{crop}}'s tolerance ({{max}}mm). Waterlogging risk — ensure proper drainage.
explanation.phInRange: Soil pH ({{ph}}) is within the optimal range [{{min}}–{{max}}].
explanation.phBelow: Soil pH ({{ph}}) is below {{crop}}'s ideal ({{min}}). Liming may be needed to reduce acidity.
explanation.phAbove: Soil pH ({{ph}}) exceeds {{crop}}'s upper limit ({{max}}). Soil amendment with sulfur or organic matter recommended.
explanation.humidityHigh: Humidity ({{hum}}%) is high — fungal disease risk for {{crop}}.
explanation.highStress: High agricultural stress on: {{features}}. Monitor crop health closely.
explanation.boundary: Near boundary conditions for: {{features}}. Slight environmental shifts could affect yield.
explanation.oodWarning: Some input values fall outside model training distribution. Confidence has been reduced accordingly.
explanation.fallback: All crops violate critical environmental thresholds. Soil and climate correction required. {{crop}} is the least unsuitable option under current conditions.

chat.title: Crop Assistant
chat.serverError: Server not reachable. Please try again.
chat.emptyResponse: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.savedForReview: This question has been saved for review.

schemes.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.
schemes.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.

weather.emptyDescription: Select your state, district, sub-district, and village/city above to see current weather conditions and a 7-day forecast for your area.
weather.locationLoadError: Failed to load location data. Please refresh.
weather.missingApiKey: Geocoding API key is not configured. Please set VITE_OPENCAGE_API_KEY in your .env file.
weather.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
weather.geocodeError: Could not find the location. Please try a different selection.
weather.locationNotFound: Location not found. Try selecting a nearby city.
weather.fetchError: Failed to fetch weather data. Please try again.
weather.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
